overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The player discovers and examines a body lying near dumpsters before crossing a multi-lane intersection with other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining patio with large yellow umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking through outdoor dining area with yellow umbrellas, approaching a body lying on the wet pavement ahead

entered.detail: large outdoor dining umbrellas with warm lighting
tall palm tree trunk visible against the foggy night sky
illuminated advertisement on distant building facade
human figure lying prone on the wet ground becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player walks through an outdoor dining area sheltered by large yellow umbrellas, with neon billboards glowing in the foggy distance. The wet pavement reflects the ambient light as the camera approaches a body lying on the ground ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered back alley with trash and a body

events.description: moves from covered dining patio into open alley where a body lies on the wet ground
player examines the body on the ground, circling around it closely

agents.ego_description: circling around the prone body on the ground, examining it from different angles in the cluttered alley

notable_agents.action: body lying face down on wet ground wearing a green shirt and brown shorts

entered.detail: black metal fence running along the left side of the alley
large green industrial dumpsters with graffiti
debris and cardboard scattered across the wet pavement
discarded cardboard boxes and packaging materials

segments.scene_description: Moving from the sheltered patio into an exposed narrow alley, the player discovers a body lying on the wet concrete. The camera circles the prone figure while green dumpsters and scattered trash become visible in the background, with neon lights reflecting off the damp surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley with green dumpsters and scattered debris

events.description: scavenger NPC comes into view searching through green dumpsters
exits the narrow alley and approaches the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: walking past green dumpsters where a scavenger is searching, heading toward the main street

notable_agents.action: scavenger in blue jacket searching through dumpster contents

entered.detail: tall street lamp casting bright light through the fog
metal barrier separating the alley from the main road
smooth concrete wall of adjacent building

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the alley, passing green dumpsters where a scavenger NPC is rummaging through trash. The environment transitions from the enclosed alley toward an open intersection, with street lamps and road barriers becoming visible as the camera approaches the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane intersection with crosswalk and digital billboards

events.description: begins crossing the street at the marked crosswalk with other pedestrians
vehicles pass by on the wet road while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane intersection at the crosswalk, moving with other pedestrians toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
massive screen displaying a clown face advertisement
elevated highway with blue neon accent lighting
suspended traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley into a wide-open intersection, the player steps onto the crosswalk stripes and begins crossing the multi-lane street. A large digital billboard displaying a clown face dominates the left side while vehicles pass on the wet asphalt, and other pedestrians walk ahead toward the opposite sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered dining area through a gritty alleyway and out into a wide, neon-lit city intersection. It begins under large yellow umbrellas where neon billboards glow through the fog and wet pavement reflects the ambient light. As the camera moves from the patio into an exposed narrow alley, it circles a body lying on the wet concrete amidst green dumpsters and scattered trash. The scene then shifts deeper into the alley, passing a scavenger rummaging through refuse before the enclosed space opens up toward street lamps and road barriers. Finally, the camera emerges onto a multi-lane street, crossing the white stripes of a crosswalk beneath a massive digital billboard of a clown face as vehicles and pedestrians move across the damp asphalt.
